EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN SEA.

1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 201600Z TO 201900Z,
   210730Z TO 211030Z AND 221330Z TO 221630Z JUN
   IN AREAS BOUND BY:
   A. 34-25N 034-00E, 34-31N 034-10E,
      34-25N 034-20E, 34-00N 034-08E,
      34-10N 034-00E.
   B. 34-23N 034-24E, 34-15N 034-36E,
      34-00N 034-33E, 34-00N 034-14E.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 221730Z JUN.
